---
title: "Iran Valladares Fuentes"
image: iran-valladares-fuentes.jpeg
draft: false
order: 2026
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:iranv@ucr.edu
---

[**Research Coordinator**]{.text-primary}

**Office:** Olmsted A0130 <br/>

**Biography**

Iran Valladares Fuentes is a Research Coordinator in the Perception, Action, & Development Lab.
